title: Project Report: LWC Custom Component Suite — Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Build 3 Lightning Web Components with Apex controllers, Jest tests, and deploy via Salesforce CLI.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**LWC Custom Component Suite** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Build 3 Lightning Web Components with Apex controllers, Jest tests, and deploy via Salesforce CLI. Tools: Salesforce CLI, LWC, Apex, Jest.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: 3 LWC components (lookup, datatable, chart)
Objective: Apex controllers with SOQL
Objective: Jest unit tests
Objective: CI deploy with sf CLI
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: LWC
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: LWC** *(Level: Advanced)*

Build 3 components. Complete these tasks: lookupSearch; dataTable; chartWidget. Deliverable for this phase: Components in org.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] lookupSearch
- [ ] dataTable
- [ ] chartWidget
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase LWC is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Components in org to the teacher.
key_takeaways: Phase LWC is one step in the full project lifecycle.

chapters.title: Phase: Apex
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Apex** *(Level: Advanced)*

Controllers + tests. Complete these tasks: @AuraEnabled; Test classes 75%+. Deliverable for this phase: Apex test results.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] @AuraEnabled
- [ ] Test classes 75%+
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Apex is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 2 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Apex test results to the teacher.

chapters.title: Phase: Jest
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Jest** *(Level: Advanced)*

LWC Jest tests. Complete these tasks: Mock data; Event tests. Deliverable for this phase: Jest coverage report.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Mock data
- [ ] Event tests
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Jest is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 3 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator agile sprints and coursework milestones.

chapters.title: Phase: CI
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: CI** *(Level: Advanced)*

GitHub Actions deploy. Complete these tasks: sf project deploy; Scratch org test. Deliverable for this phase: CI pipeline green.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] sf project deploy
- [ ] Scratch org test
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase CI is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 4 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Salesforce CRM Developer / Administrator agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the CI pipeline green to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: GitHub repo; Deployed components; Test reports; CI pipeline. Skills demonstrated: LWC, Apex, CI/CD. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: GitHub repo
Deliverable: Deployed components
Deliverable: Test reports
Deliverable: CI pipeline
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits GitHub repo and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
